text:
Stairs Inside Home Must Be Used Structural barriers: stairs inside which must be used by patient. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0310_STR_OPT_ISTR (M0310) Stairs Inside Home Used Optionally Structural barriers: stairs inside home which are used optionally. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0310_STR_OUTSTAIR (M0310) Stairs Leading Inside Home Structural barriers: stairs leading from inside to outside house. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0320_SAF_HAZ_MAT (M0320) Improperly Stored Hazardous Materials Safety
